user.title: Dreame MF10
user.description: Sign in with your Dreamehome account to discover the Dreame Bladeless Fan MF10.

pick_device.title: Select device
pick_device.description: Your account has more than one supported Dreame MF10. Pick which one to add.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Dreame MF10
reauth_confirm.description: Your Dreamehome credentials are no longer valid. Enter your username and password to restore the connection.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Dreame cloud. Check your connection and selected region.
error.no_supported_devices: No Dreame MF10 (dreame.fan.u2519) found on this account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs.

abort.no_supported_devices: No Dreame MF10 (dreame.fan.u2519) found on this account.
abort.reauth_successful: Re-authentication successful. The integration will now reload.
